_note:
Missing required prop on a component call. Shim's `__svn_ensure_component` overload for `Component

` returns a ctor with `props?: P` (exact, no Partial widening), so TS2741 fires directly at the `new __svn_C_({props: {...}})` site with the precise error code. `collect_satisfies_token_map` (name kept for history; now scans `new __svn_C_(...)` calls) maps the overlay call span back to the component name's first byte in source — col 1 is `C` of ``, matching upstream. Prior v0.3 Item 2 emitted a `satisfies InstanceType<...>['$$prop_def']` trailer that fired TS1360 at col 0 (the `<`); replaced by direct prop-type check via shim exact-P + call-span mapping.
